hotel_name: Khách sạn Tala Đà Lạt (Tala Dalat Hotel)

reviews.title: Miss leading photo, higyne issues Mold, cocroch ants so on
reviews.text:
I pick this hotel becasue of nice reviews and newly renovated. But I could not stay here more then 1 hr. Once I step in Moldy smell cover the whole room, mold every where in the bathroom. They offer a scent spray. I tried to stay here so open front door, no proper window. Then found cocroch at bathroom asked staff to do something for my my family left room then came back within 1 hr we found ant on persimmom peel which we just eat before. Asked room changed other option but nothing offered and said it is normal here in Vietnam. 
For my family's safety we moved to other hotel and still waiting for refund. 
Do not try your luck here

reviews.title: Noisy, humid, low breakfast standard hotel in good location
reviews.text: The rooms are not soundproof (we booked 3 rooms in various floors) All rooms are very humid. Bed sheets are dirty, my kid got rash, and my wife got nasal allergy after staying there for one night. Breakfast is very bed with only 1 choice. Staff is very unfriendly. reviews.title: Overall, we were disappointed with choosing this hotel.

reviews.negatives: The room was very musty smelling and the hotel could use a refresh. There were stains on the wall, the windows were filthy, the bathroom fixtures were showing signs of rust and the breakfast was mediocre.

reviews.title: It is not a good place to stay!!! Not clean nor new at all.

reviews.title: 3 nights experience in Da Lat
reviews.text:
We’ve been there during May holidays, and the room with valley view on the 1st floor near to the internal  backyard road, view was mostly on next building roofs, a bit different from what you see on the picture . Room was clean but had some issue with sink’s drain cause once you washed your hands - water is around you, staff was trying to fix that but didn’t. 
Do not recommend breakfast in the hotel, not so many options available.
Overall: 3 stars for that price
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We appreciate your feedback from your recent stay during the May holidays.

We apologize for any disappointment regarding the room view and the issue with the sink's drain. We understand how important it is to meet our guests' expectations, and we regret that we fell short in this regard. Rest assured, we are addressing these issues to ensure a more consistent experience for our guests in the future.

Regarding breakfast, we apologize if the options did not meet your expectations. We will review and improve our breakfast offerings to provide more variety and quality.

Your feedback is valuable to us as we strive to improve our services. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with a better experience.

Best Regards,
The Hotel Management

reviews.title: If you value your sleep don't book this hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel has 0 soundproofing. We barely slept during our stay as we could hear even the telephone conversation from the room next door. On top of that, some other guests were shouting in the corridor at 6am. Then the hotel, chooses to start playing music in the corridors at 8:30am which due to the non-existent soundproofing is like having a speaker inside the room. 
The cherry on top is some neighbor who decided to have a karaoke party at 7:30am with loudspeakers.

reviews.title: Bon séjour dans sa globalité. Bel environnement au calme.
reviews.positives:

La salle de bain, et notamment la douche, est très bien équipée et les chambres sont propres.
reviews.negatives: Il faisait un peu chaud dans les chambres, surtout les chambres sans fenêtres, il n’y avait pas de climatisation (séjour en mai). Donc on a du ouvrir les fenêtres, et nous avons mal dormi à cause des moustiques.

reviews.title: Nice quiet hotel
reviews.text: Nice quiet hotel.  For people who appreciate peace and quietness. A bit far from Go Dalat or lake,  about 20 to 30 minutes walk.  No food outlets around.  Staff is ok, can arrange tours and transport.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback! We're pleased to hear that you enjoyed the peaceful and quiet atmosphere of our hotel. We understand that our location requires a bit of walking to reach center Dalat or the lake, and we appreciate your understanding. Our team is always ready to assist with arranging tours and transport to make your stay as convenient as possible. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for another relaxing stay in the future!

Best regards,

The Hotel Management

reviews.title: Toole ruhige Lage für in sich lautes Hotel
reviews.positives: Das Bad und das große Zimmer, Bett war auch groß und gemütlich
reviews.negatives:
Wir wussten gar nicht, dass es Zimmer ohne Fenster gibt, habe ich bei der Buchung übersehen, aber es ist furchtbar, das macht auch das große Zimmer nicht Wett.
Wir waren auf der selben Ebene wie die Lobby, wir haben leider alles gehört, früh morgens um 5 Uhr kamen die ersten lauten Gespräche. Keine Rücksicht von dem Personal, leider. Zwischendurch kurz ruhig, dann wieder Laute Gespräche, u.s.w.
Auch aus anderen Zimmern hat man alles mitbekommen, lautstark und haarklein aus dem Nachbarzimmer.
Kreditkarten Zahlung nur mit vietnamesischen karten möglich.
Frühstück furchtbar.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is worth the money, and it also offers quite beautiful views. However, I was very disappointed with the quality of the room cleaning.  I had to clean up on my own to feel comfortable.

reviews.title: Alles in allem gut, groß, sauber und hilfsbereit
reviews.positives: An der Rezeption spricht man gutes englisch, der Raum war sehr groß und sauber. In meinem Raum unterm Dach gab es einen Kühlschrank, einen großen Schrank, einen Schreibtisch. Im separatem großen Bad, das mit einer normalen Tür getrennt ist (wichtig für Privatsphäre, wenn man zu zweit reist) gibt es eine Badewanne mit Aussicht. Alle Fenster kann man öffnen, im Bad ist auch zusätzlich eine Abluft vorhanden. Frühstück wurde mir personalisiert ohne Aufpreis. An der Rezeption kann man alles erfragen und bekommt schnell gute Hilfe.
reviews.negatives: Die Bettdecken sind sehr dünn, aber ich nahm die vom zweiten Bett dazu, es gab in diesem Raum keine Heizung und keine Klimaanlage, nur einen Ventilator. Leider ist der Druck in der Wasserleitung sehr gering und es gibt weder eine Duschstange noch einen Vorhang, darum funktionierte es mit dem Duschen nur im Sitzen in der Wanne. Das Bett war sehr hart.

reviews.title: Phòng đơn nhỏ, hôi và ngộp
reviews.text: Dù staff đã alert phòng đơn không có cửa sổ nhưng đến nhận phòng vẫn bị sốc vì độ ngộp dẫn đến mùi hôi và ẩm của căn phòng. Chỉ có 1 khung cửa sổ nhỏ trên cao nhưng lại thông ra hành lang. Không có tác dụng thông thoáng và rất bất tiện vì nếu muốn, người ngoài có thể nhìn vào phòng. Có nhiều sâu tường bám vào khăn tạo mùi hôi cho khăn (khách sạn hỗ trợ xử lý nhưng qua hôm sau xuất hiện lại). Không có tủ quần áo. Nhà tắm lắp 1 bảng điều khiển rất to (1/4 không gian phòng tắm). Thông gió trong restroom rất yếu, không giúp thông khí và mùi trong đó được.
reviews.response:
Chào Quý Khách,

Cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian để chia sẻ ý kiến. Chúng tôi xin lỗi vì những trải nghiệm không hài lòng mà quý khách đã gặp phải. Đội ngũ của chúng tôi sẽ xem xét và xử lý ngay những vấn đề mà quý khách đã nêu, bao gồm việc cải thiện hệ thống thông gió, vệ sinh phòng và khắc phục vấn đề sâu tường. Chúng tôi cũng sẽ xem xét lại thiết kế của phòng để mang đến sự thoải mái và tiện nghi hơn cho khách hàng. Hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội đón tiếp quý khách lần tới với những cải tiến tích cực hơn.

Trân trọng,
Ban Quản Lý Khách Sạn

reviews.title: Good experience, decent amenities.
reviews.text:
- The accommodation is located a bit far from the center, close to GO Da Lat but relatively far from Da Lat Night Market.
- The space is relatively fine, but the rooms with mountain views are quite expensive, while the standard rooms do not have views.
- The staff is friendly and pleasant.
- The amenities meet basic needs well, and since it's far from the center, you'll need to use an app for food and drinks.
- The prices are relatively reasonable, considering that during holidays the room rates can double or triple, so it's worth considering as the prices are comparable to 4-star hotels in the center.
- This is a viable option if you're looking for a place to stay and relax.

reviews.title: Great staff and nice location, but the room was a bit stuffy.
reviews.text:
The hotel is located on a small hillside, and about 100 meters away there is an incredibly beautiful café — perfect for enjoying the mountain view and taking photos.

Our room had a small balcony facing the mountain, but the balcony was connected to all the rooms and even to the restaurant area, so we had to keep the door locked at night. Unfortunately, this made the room quite stuffy.

The room itself was fairly basic and a bit old, but considering the price, it’s still good value for sightseeing purposes. Breakfast was available in the morning, although we didn’t try it during our stay.

One male and one female staff member at the front desk were especially kind and helpful, and they assisted us with many issues.

reviews.title: Worth the price
reviews.text:
The hotel is located in a quiet area, close to the King Palace (No.2) surrounded by many pine trees.

It takes about five minutes by motorbike to reach the city center and other attractions like Xuan Huong Lake, Da Lat Market, or Con Ga Church.

The staff were helpful and supportive.

One thing to consider is that the balconies of all rooms on the same floor are connected, which means all rooms share the same large balcony. If you are traveling with a large family, it will be fine. However, if you are traveling as a couple or alone, this is something to consider.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at this hotel and was absolutely delighted. The rooms are spacious, clean, and cozy, with a modern design and everything you need for a comfortable stay: comfortable furniture and high-quality bedding. The windows offer a stunning view of the mountains, bringing a sense of calm and inspiration.

The staff are always attentive, polite, and ready to help in any situation, whether it’s recommending a local café or arranging a transfer. And the hotel’s location is simply superb: within walking distance of the most interesting sights, shops, and restaurants. I highly recommend this hotel to anyone who values comfort, care, and the beauty of the surrounding nature.

reviews.title: Suite With Balcony
reviews.text: The hotel just opened in December 2024, with new facilities, spacious, airy, and clean rooms. I stayed in a Suite with Balcony which has an extremely beautiful view (the views from the 3rd and 4th floors are the best). The bed is large, 2 meters wide, very comfortable to lie on. The modern toilet has a hot water display with fancy temperature indicators, and the toilet has an automatic washing system, clean and fragrant. Specially, the room is equipped with an essential oil diffuser; putting in a bit of scented oil makes the whole room fragrant. The TV has YouTube and channels, but it's quite small at only 32 inches. Pros: new hotel, clean and beautiful, nice view, and a location close to the interprovincial bus station, about 5 minutes by motorbike to Ho Xuan Huong. Cons: still unknown.

reviews.title: PERSONAL FEELINGS
reviews.text: I've been here for 2 nights, and overall everything is quite okay. The bed is a bit dusty (generally, at a 3-star hotel during the New Year, it's quite difficult to have enough time to vacuum the bed sheets), so I'm not okay with just the bed. Oh, and the toilet is a bit dirty too, but the fixtures are all high quality from the toilet to the showerhead, everything is really good. Oh, it's important to mention that the sound insulation is quite good, so there is no humidity in the room due to the cold air, which makes the temperature in the room quite different from outside. At night, we turned on the fan to sleep, the view is okay, and I found a good deal on Agoda for 2 nights, hehe. If I would come back or not depends (if I can find a good deal).

reviews.positives: Nhân viên rất nhiệt tình, vui vẻ, thân thiện. Khuôn viên đẹp, cây cối được chăm sóc cẩn thận. Bể bơi chung có cứu hộ trực, bể bơi riêng nước sạch. Có khu vui chơi trẻ em, phòng gym, spa. Biển khá sạch và đẹp. Hầu như chỉ có khách của vin nên ko đông và rất an toàn. Có vòi nước nóng lạnh và hệ thống điều hoà ở tất cả các phòng. Có hệ thống xe tuktuk để di chuyển trong khuôn viên khách sạn, và các tuyến vinbus di chuyển đến các khu du lịch gần đó..
reviews.negatives: Hệ thống vòi rửa tay, vòi hoa sen hơi cũ, một số núm điều chỉnh bị hư hỏng. Thành giường có một số chi tiết bị lỏng lẻo (4 cột 4 góc giường).  Nhân viên ko chú ý xếp vị trí villa gần biển như đã được đề nghị. Vì đoàn toàn người già và trẻ nhỏ nên di chuyển đến biển cần phải gọi xe tuktuk của Vinpearl để di chuyển đến biển. Buffet các món bánh âu và salad rất ngon, còn món Á hơi ít lựa chọn và cũng chưa thực sự xuất sắc..

reviews.title: Well worth the experience.
reviews.text: We accidentally found out about Hotel while taking the shuttle bus from Tan Quang Dung company and booked the Superior Queen Room without a window for 330k on the last day of our trip. When we arrived, the hotel staff offered us an upgrade to a room with a balcony (+ an additional 50k) because another group of guests requested to stay in the rooms we booked. Upon entering, we realized that the newly assigned room was extremely nice, clean, with a beautiful view, and all the facilities were quite modern (even the bathroom had an electronic warm water adjustment system for the shower and toilet). The room was warm compared to the outdoor temperature. The staff was enthusiastic, and there was an automatic lock. If we have the chance to return to Da Lat, we will definitely choose Tala Dalat again.

reviews.title: Fantastic stay
reviews.text: We had a fantastic stay at this hotel in Da Lat. The location was great, with easy access to transportation. The staff were friendly and provided excellent service. The facilities were top-notch, with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. I was expecting them to have AC but I guess since Da Lat has cooler weather so they only have electric fans but that’s okay. We have very nice view from our room just like what my friend recommended. We highly recommend this hotel for reasonable price but still good amenities for anyone visiting Da Lat.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear that you had a fantastic stay at our hotel in Da Lat. It's great to know that you enjoyed our convenient location, friendly staff, and top-notch facilities. We apologize for any confusion regarding the air conditioning, as Da Lat's cooler climate means we typically provide electric fans instead. We're delighted that you appreciated the nice view from your room, just as your friend recommended. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay at a reasonable price with excellent amenities.

Best regards,
The Hotel Management

reviews.response:
Chào Quý Khách,

Cảm ơn quý khách đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình tại khách sạn vào dịp lễ 30/04 và 1/5 vừa qua. Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi biết rằng bạn đã thấy mọi thứ đều ok và đánh giá xứng đáng với số tiền đã bỏ ra.

Chúng tôi xin chân thành xin lỗi về sự bất tiện mà quý khách đã gặp phải về vấn đề thức ăn sáng. Chúng tôi sẽ nghiêm túc xem xét và cải thiện hơn về phương án xử lý thức ăn sáng, để đảm bảo sự sạch sẽ và tiện lợi cho quý khách. Ý kiến của quý khách là cơ sở quan trọng giúp chúng tôi hoàn thiện dịch vụ.

Một lần nữa, cảm ơn quý khách đã đánh giá cao và recommend khách sạn của chúng tôi cho mọi người. Chúng tôi rất mong được đón tiếp quý khách và bạn bè quay lại trong những chuyến đi sau này.
Trân trọng,
Ban Quản Lý Khách Sạn

reviews.title: 10 points are not there but
reviews.text: At first, I was a bit worried that the dining and campfire area being right in the lobby would be noisy or inconvenient, but after experiencing it, I felt completely reassured and confident to recommend this place to friends and family if there's a chance to return. The parking area is spacious for both cars and motorbikes for my family, plus the hotel staff is very attentive and organized when reading customer messages and responding, as well as executing everything very well. Additionally, the place is very clean, usually, beds are spring mattresses and can be noisy, but the hotel is very thoughtful in ensuring there’s no noise from the mattress. Also, although the balcony is shared, it is very private and doesn’t feel intrusive. The bathrooms are extremely clean, and the hot and cold water system is easy to use, heating up quickly and allowing for temperature adjustments to be comfortably warm when showering in the very cold Dalat weather in December. In the evening, the lobby plays seasonal music; I enjoyed playing Christmas music. Overall, I’d rate it a perfect 100 out of 10; there aren’t enough words to express my family’s satisfaction with this trip.
